calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Debroah Fox for and with David Volansky. Jesse Powell (Beneficiary) also present.

Mr. Powell stated that he volunteers two days a week at a book store and that he spends most of his time writing at home. Ms. Fox explained that the need for a Trust Protector is in the event the Trustee does not work out, or if there is a personality clash or a problem with communication between the Trustee and the Beneficiary. Ms. Fox also explained that the Trust Protectors can remove and appoint new Trustees, review accountings and be informal advocates without a fee. In addition, Ms. Fox stated that they are asking that the trust remain out of Court supervision. The Petition Re Substituted Judgment Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Continued To Jul-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
